questions.text: Which unit is used to measure length in SI system?
questions.explanation: Meter (m) is the SI unit of length. It is the standard unit used worldwide for scientific measurements.
1 kilometer (km) = 1000 meters. The prefix 'kilo' means 1000 in the metric system.

questions.text: What type of motion does a swinging pendulum exhibit?
questions.explanation: A pendulum exhibits periodic (oscillatory) motion as it moves back and forth about its mean position at regular intervals.

questions.text: The distance between two cities is measured in ________.
questions.explanation: Kilometers are used to measure large distances like those between cities. 1 km = 1000 m.
